pcaconnectorad.template.extensionsv4.Cfn: Certificate extensions for v4 template schema

pcaconnectorad.template.extensionsv4.App.Description: Application policies specify what the certificate is used for and its purpose.

pcaconnectorad.template.extensionsv4.Key.Description: The key usage extension defines the purpose (e.g., encipherment, signature) of the key contained in the certificate.
